title: Young Husbands
writer: Mauro Bolognini, Enzo Curreli, Pasquale Festa Campanile
actors: Isabelle Corey, Antonio Cifariello, Franco Interlenghi
plot: A movie about the mixed feelings of young adulthood. Main characters rather casually enter into marriage, never intending true fidelity to their spouses. When they realize that they're committed for life, the immature boy-husbands...
